findings.description: Source has 3 h2 headings (出力方針, 出力項目, 出力方法) and 1 h3 heading (出力例), but the knowledge file has only 1 section (s1). The 出力方法 h2 section alone contains a class table, Java code example, warning, large properties table, placeholder table, default format, and an h3 subsection (出力例) — well over 2000 chars of plain text. Per V3 rules, a section with >= 2000 chars and an h3 subsection should be split in the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: RST h2: パフォーマンスログの出力方針, パフォーマンスログの出力項目, パフォーマンスログの出力方法; RST h3: パフォーマンスログの出力例 (under ^^^)
